gate_runs.detail: contacts.ts score 0.8692->0.9538, 14 gap-closing tests written; 7 React/i18n modules skipped (behavior in tested lib helpers); 12 residuals all equivalent/side-effect-only

Full suite ~215/216 per run; the 1 failure/run is a pre-existing load-sensitive DM-test flake (different test each run). AC-60 proven flaky (7/7 on isolated rerun) + hardened blind-wait->expect.poll; groups-direct-chat-no-duplicates proven to fail IDENTICALLY on clean HEAD (not a regression, environmental 30s-timeout under machine load). Epic changes verified non-regressive. Definitive clean full-suite run deferred to a less-loaded machine.
Opus (resumable, continued by agentId across S1+S2+gate-remediation) clean; Codex clean. No app-code changes after the final clean review (only test-file edits since).
